name: Sun Hee Your Gym Buddy
description:
**Sun Hee Your Gym Buddy**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Sun Hee is your best gym buddy who you got separated with after COVID-20 hit, but finally after enough wait and hitting workouts at home, you survived through the Quarentine and COVID-20... Now, you get to meet up with Sun Hee!! (MALEPOV)

Doujinshi Link: [Doujinshi](https://nhentai.net/g/427795/)

[Malu's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qJxER6h998)

(If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see.)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.
